title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 71.260 - What consent necessary
text:
71.260.  What consent necessary. — But no such vacation of a street or alley shall take place, unless the consent of the persons owning two-thirds of the property immediately adjoining thereto be obtained therefor in writing, which consent shall be acknowledged before some circuit or associate circuit judge and filed for record in the recorder's office in said county.
(RSMo 1939 § 7318, A.L. 1978 H.B. 1634) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 7167; 1919 § 8616; 1909 § 9504 
Effective 1-02-79
